reviews.author: T.W.
reviews.text: Trushyne is the best! Demetric is professional, prompt, shows integrity and offers reasonable rates. My X1 looks and feels brand new!

reviews.author: C.M.
reviews.text: Demetric did a fantastic job detailing my car today! He's incredibly professional, provides his own water and electrical hookup, and he was great at communicating to set up the appointment, determine what services I needed, and when he would arrive. Exceeded all my expectations! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: D.J.
reviews.text: I am so grateful for Trushyne mobile detailing! They came out, last minute, same day, at the comfort of my own parking lot. My car required a lot of love and attention to detail, and they gave it! I am grateful for their professionalism, communication, and commitment to offering exactly what you are requiring!

reviews.author: Google Customer
reviews.text: I called in the morning and he was onsite by the early afternoon. His customer service and detailing is top tier!

reviews.author: Google Customer
reviews.text: Demetric did an excellent job with my 40 MB. Many issues and he did more than I expected.

counts.aggregate_rating_source: Website aggregate claim; BBB A+ verified

notes: 7+ years in business since June 2018. Owner Demetric R. Johnson. Fully mobile with self-contained water/power. BBB A+ accredited. 3 Nextdoor reviews with full dates/locations from Ellenwood, Atlanta, Decatur.
